metadata.label: spam_fomorush
metadata.name: Spam fomorush
metadata.description: Spam wallets promoting fomorush.io, neurocity_ai_bot, and impersonating HTX exchange via address poisoning.

addresses.source: Sends 0.01 TON to 76,296 addresses with comment linking to launch.fomorush.io ([tx history](https://tonviewer.com/EQCtIt9BcRyVTobtj-dxBjuxzycapGg0XDoRVM8CeIoQOIAb)).
addresses.comment: fomorush.io promotional spam. Highload_v3r1, 76K recipients, 0.01 TON each with phishing link.

addresses.source: Sends 0.01 TON with comment 'neurocity_ai_bot' to 8,755 addresses ([tx history](https://tonviewer.com/EQBywH1FzGl7hqaJE1K_1VJ-qOpp4AYWQwWHEzVy1pD8qeto)). Highload_v3r1, batches of 100 messages.

Sends 0 TON to 2,988 addresses. Primary counterparty uses .ton domain htx-9tuqx5jg-coin.ton impersonating HTX exchange ([tx history](https://tonviewer.com/EQASN10Sdk-o9i0sLVThbHzPXConeAPEtpFzLPMzgPNqgQ6N)).
addresses.comment: HTX address poisoning. Zero-value sends to appear in recipient tx history with htx-impersonation domain.
